audit_scope: Targeted: §03 PATH TO L4 (milestone column added) + new §04 PATH TO L4 · the build plan + §04→§05 Design Portfolio renumber. Pre-existing §00-§02 not audited; §05 verified for label-renumber only.

findings.issue: Table column header reads 'What it unlocks for this platform' — uses 'unlocks', a banned filler verb per tone-of-voice §7. The column appears in the §03 grid-table for every multi-agent platform page (Impetus most prominent).
findings.fix: Change column header to 'What it delivers for this platform' OR 'What it changes for this platform'. Edit tools/inject_path_to_l4.py:276 (header literal in render_platform_section), then re-run python tools/inject_path_to_l4.py to sweep.

findings.issue: Body copy reads 'Status against the chairman-facing build plan as of 03-May-2026'. The phrase 'chairman-facing build plan' names an internal-positioning artefact — borderline on the tone-of-voice §3 rule against 'internal source-document references in body copy'. While not as explicit as 'Accenture s37' or 'Farooq §1.4', it reveals the internal authoring context (a deck prepared for the Chairman) which is Fynd-internal framing.
findings.fix: Reword to 'Status against the active build plan as of 03-May-2026' or simply 'Status as of 03-May-2026' (the dates in the cards already imply the build plan).

findings.issue: The deliverable tables in §04 (.bp-table) have no overflow-x-auto wrapper. At narrow viewports (~500px), the table extends beyond the viewport width, causing the page body to scroll horizontally by ~36px. The §03 grid-table is correctly wrapped — §04 tables are not.
findings.fix: Wrap each <table class="bp-table"> in <div class="overflow-x-auto"> · matches the §03 pattern. Alternatively add `.bp-card .bp-body { overflow-x: auto; }` in the inline <style> block as a single-rule fix that catches all current and future bp-tables.

findings.issue: Five ad-hoc hex literals introduced in the new <style> block: #FFF7ED, #FED7AA, #C2410C (defining .bp-pill-milestone) and #FAFAF9, #FAFAFA (background). The first three exactly duplicate the existing .pill-pilot variant in style.css §2.2 (#FFF7ED / #C2410C / #FED7AA). Per design.md §1.1: 'Never introduce a new hex value. Use a token from :root.' Per design.md §2.2: 'Don't add new pill variants without adding them here.'
findings.fix: Drop .bp-pill-milestone from the inline

findings.issue: Off-scale font-size 12.5px on table.bp-table — design.md §1.2 documented scale is 10/11/12/13/14/15/16/18/24/32/36/48/64/72.
findings.fix: Round to 13px (the closest documented-scale value) on table.bp-table. One-line edit at impetus/index.html:348.

findings.issue: Pre-existing label '01 · What we built · 15 sub-platforms in production' uses 'we' (banned) AND 'in production' (engineering jargon, translate to 'live' / 'running today' per §7). Out of scope for this PR but flagged for the next sweep.
findings.fix: Rename to '01 · 15 sub-platforms · live across F&L' or similar. Out of scope for this audit's PR — leave for the broader register sweep.

findings.issue: Inline foot-link in §03 paragraph uses `font-size: 0.92em` (relative em rather than the documented px scale). Per design.md §1.2 the convention is px on the documented scale.
findings.fix: Change to `font-size: 13px` (matches the surrounding mono caption convention). Edit tools/inject_path_to_l4.py:225 (where the foot-link is appended).

findings.issue: Pre-req rows (Cortex Card 1) currently render as `pill-build` (amber). The xlsx legend lists 'Pre-req' as its own status. The pill works visually (amber = needs-attention) but conflates Pre-req with Building.
findings.fix: Acceptable as-is — the legend at the bottom of §04 explicitly labels both. Optionally introduce a `.pill-prereq` variant in style.css if Pre-req becomes a recurring status across the site.

strengths: Honesty register is exemplary on §04 — the lead paragraph explicitly notes today (03-May-2026) vs Day-0 baseline (04-May-2026), so the all-Planned status pills under Cortex are correctly contextualised. No overclaim.

§03 milestone column wires per-deployment dates from the canonical agents-x-platforms.yaml registry — schema-extensible (Category Intelligence's '—' is honest blank not fabricated date), and re-running the injector will keep dates current.
Section-label contiguity preserved after the §04 → §05 renumber (verified: 01, 02, 03, 04, 05).
All ~80 deliverables in §04 trace verbatim to F&L AI Projects.xlsx by row — workstream names, dates, status mappings all match the source xlsx 1:1.
Bidirectional anchor links between §03 and §04 work correctly (verified via DevTools: §03 → §04 lands at scroll position matching the section top; §04 → §03 returns).
All required page chrome intact (nav, footer single-line, auth.js); the canonical-source rule for §03 is preserved (sweep-rendered, no hand-authoring).
Cross-page consistency strong: 47,473 / 2,975 / 3,957 numbers identical on §04 (Impetus), agent stat tile, agent SVG eval gate, and agents/ index card.
